title: HG ECO Limescale Remover, All Purpose Cleaner, Kitchen Cleaner & Bathroom Cleaner Spray, Sink, Tap & Toilet Cleaner with Fresh Scent, Eco Conscious HG Cleaning Products, Recyclable - 500ml (683050106)
features: HG Limescale Remover spray: HG Limescale cleaner is a multi surface cleaner formula which is tough on scale but gentle on ceramic, porcelain, tiles, chrome, metal, stainless steel and worktops
Powerful all surface cleaner: Use as a sink cleaner through to a bathtub cleaner and shower head, to remove stubborn limescale on a variety of surfaces around the home, leaving a sparkling shine
Easy to use, non toxic kitchen cleaning and bathroom cleaning products: Removes limescale deposits on taps, sinks and surfaces. Simply spray, leave to work and wipe off the residue
HG eco cleaning products for your home: HG professional grade cleaning formulas are ultra effective yet kinder to the planet. Free from preservatives, phosphates, colourings and microplastics
1 x HG ECO Limescale Remover, 500ml, in a bottle made of recyclable materials. Discover the range of HG household cleaning products, with HG bathroom cleaning products and HG bathroom floor cleaner
description: Product Description Want to remove limescale without using harmful chemicals? HG ECO Limescale Remover is the ideal limescale remover for all types of surfaces. Gentle on appliances and easy to use, the bleach-free and paraben-free multi surface cleaner, bathroom cleaner, floor cleaner and kitchen cleaner spray is safe for use on sinks, baths, taps, shower heads and work tops throughout your home. The result is a sparkling shine! Discover HG's wide range of specialist cleaning products for your home, office and outside space. • Our eco package made of 100% recyclable materials includes: 1 x HG ECO Limescale Remover (500ml spray bottle) • Anti lime scale surface cleaner spray for use around the house • Sustainable formula • Sparkling clean result • 100% recyclable packaging • Non toxic formula, ideal for homes with children and pets How to use: 1. Spray on 2. Leave to work 3. Rinse or wipe off with a damp cloth About HG’s ECO all-purpose cleaner range: We want to offer you a more environmentally-conscious, sustainable choice for your bathroom, kitchen, living room and home. All HG ECO cleaning products are free from preservatives, phosphates, phosphonates, colourings and micro-plastics, as well as being paraben-free and chlorine-free. Ingredients Cleaner Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International b.v., P.J. Oudweg 41, 1314 CJ Almere, The Netherlands. See more
